description: Prediction market intelligence REST API — AI research, causal analysis, trading signals, and arbitrage for Kalshi and Polymarket.
rules: Base URL is https://api.rekko.ai/v1 — all endpoint paths are relative to this
Authentication uses Bearer tokens: Authorization: Bearer rk_free_... or rk_pro_...
Analysis endpoints use async trigger-poll-retrieve pattern (POST to start, GET to poll, GET to retrieve)
Expand parameter (?expand=causal,scenarios) adds nested detail to responses
OpenAPI spec at https://api.rekko.ai/openapi.json for full endpoint schemas
